dialogos.texto_en: Five years later%p-2;――
Welcome%p-2;――
Oh, it's you guys.
It's been a while, Ichika.
We've been waiting for you!\nWelcome back to Japan!
Long time no see!\nYou three look good, that's great%p-2;――
Yeah, it's good, but hey,\nis the shop open today?\nIt's the day of the wedding after all.
Yeah, I was surprised when I showed up.\nYou couldn't stop her, Nino?
I did.\nHowever, she insisted on doing things as usual.
If I don't do anything,\nI'll start thinking about unnecessary things.\nStanding here makes me feel calm.
Besides, there might be regulars coming today.\nIf the shop was closed, they would be disappointed.
Oh c'mon, it wouldn't be a problem today, right?\nBesides, we've already said we're having a wedding\nin advance.
Oh, then maybe the flowers there\nare wedding gifts from customers?
The flowers over there, too?
Yes, that's right.
Recently, we've been getting more regulars.\nI refused the flowers at first, but they kept insisting.
It feels wonderful to receive wedding wishes\nfrom customers, doesn't it?
...I'm really happy.\nTo show our appreciation for the people \nwho support us, we have to work hard at the shop.
That's right, we need you to do your best. \nMore customers are coming to the shop that\nlove your pastries and want to try your food, Miku.
Wow! Isn't it amazing to have fans like that?
Nino, if you're not careful,\nyour disciple might surpass you, you know?
I don't really mind, you know?\nIt still contributes to our sales.
Oh my, you're not being honest at all.
Miku has matured a lot.\nI miss the time when she made stone croquettes.
Come on. When was that?
Miku has a teacher named Nino.\nIn fact, she's good at teaching, too.
Well, it's an honor\nto be praised by a real teacher like you.
But in the end, it's because Miku\nhas been working very hard.\nShe overcame her clumsiness and acquired a sense of taste.
...Thanks.
Yeah, yeah, that is the power of love!
Love...
Well... The main reason you started your\nculinary journey was because\nyou want Uesugi-san to eat delicious food, right?
That's true, but...
In that case, 'NAKANO' is safe for now.
No, we're not quite there yet.\nI'm planning to make\neven more delicious dishes than now.
Oh, you're fired up, huh?
I've heard that the popular item menu at the store\nthat was here before was homemade bread.
I also want to create a store's signature dish,\nsomething similar to that.
Have you decided what kind of dish to make?
Not yet, but I've been making various trial products\nand having Futaro taste them multiple times.
Hmmm?
I see.
Hm? What?
Having him taste them multiple times, huh?
That's what it is.\nThey're already working together as a team of two.
O-oh, c'mon.\nDon't tease me like that.
I'm looking forward to the signature dish.
Okay.
Oh yeah.\nSpeaking of which, regarding that matter,\nmy makeup artist will come.
So, you're really going to do it.
Yes. We'll have to have Uesugi-kun confirm it.
Well, let's take care of that then.
Okay.
The one I had was still stored away.
This is our wedding gift to you, Miku.
It's Mom's heirloom earrings.
When we get to the venue,\nthings'll get chaotic,\nso we should pierce your ears there.
Pierce her ears, huh?
There's no other option, is there?\nI brought a piercer too.
Is it okay with you, Miku?
Yes.\nI was planning to wear them for the wedding anyway.
Is this your first time getting pierced? Are you okay?
To be honest, I'm a bit anxious,\nbut with everybody's support I should be fine.
That's good. Don't forget those words.
In response to your determination,\nwe will also pierce your ears with all our hearts.
U-um?\nBoth of you seem...
It's okay, the pain is only temporary.
Well...\nIs everyone gonna bless me?
Of course.\nPlease receive our gratitude, okay?
I feel like\nthere's a different emotion behind that...
Let's make today an unforgettable memory!
S-sorry! Give me time to mentally prepare myself%p-2;――
Yotsuba.\nHold her down a little.
Okaaay.
Y-Yotsuba?!
One, two, three!
Miku, congratulations on getting married!
EEEP!
